situation: audit-2026-07-07-047 derived fix SZ-SP-L-002 (low): handleDeleteText stale closure — rapid deletes undo each other because useCallback captures `result` at definition time. Same root cause as SZ-SP-L-001 (deletedStack mirror already in place). Also affects handleUndoDelete which closes over both `result` and `deletedStack`.
action: Added resultRef mirror (useRef + useEffect sync) alongside existing deletedStackRef. Rewrote handleDeleteText and handleUndoDelete to read resultRef.current/deletedStackRef.current instead of closing over state. Dropped result/deletedStack from useCallback deps so callbacks stay stable across renders while always operating on latest state. Stacked on opt-sidepanel-1782907225 via case-104 direct-edit channel (cp-guard triggered because SZ-SP-L-001 had already diverged SidePanelApp.tsx from main).
outcome_evidence: commit a49791f on auto/opt-sidepanel-1782907225, pushed to origin. Diff: +24/-10 lines in SidePanelApp.tsx. resultRef + handleDeleteText/handleUndoDelete rewrite verified via git diff.
next_suggestion: Next pending route-fix from audit-2026-07-07-047: SZ-SP-L-003 (DetectionInfoPanel uses array index as key — causes wrong item highlight after reorder/delete) or SZ-PP-L-002 (testVisionConnection no timeout — button disabled forever on hang). Both are small 1-file fixes.

audit_findings.finding: handleDeleteText closes over `result` directly — two rapid deletes within same render cycle race: second delete reads pre-first-delete result.details, first deletion is overwritten, deleted text reappears
audit_findings.remediation: Add resultRef mirror (useRef + useEffect sync), read resultRef.current in callback, drop result from deps

audit_findings.finding: handleUndoDelete same stale closure pattern for both `result` and `deletedStack` — undo-after-delete can resurrect stale snapshot
audit_findings.remediation: Same resultRef mirror + existing deletedStackRef mirror; drop both from deps
